steps: Go to https://mixpanel.com and log in (or create a free account)
Select the project you want to use from the top navigation
Click the settings gear icon or go to https://mixpanel.com/settings/project
On the 'Overview' tab, scroll down to the 'Access Keys' section
Find the 'Project Token' (for ingestion) and 'API Secret' (for query/export)
Copy the relevant credential for your use case

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Secret
credential_fields.description: Your Mixpanel project API secret, used as the Basic Auth username with an empty password

notes: For ingestion endpoints, use the Project Token; for query/export endpoints, use the API Secret
The API Secret is used via HTTP Basic Auth — provide it as the username with an empty password
Project Secret authentication is being deprecated; new integrations should consider Service Accounts
Free tier available with event volume limits
Each project has a separate API secret; credentials are project-scoped

test_endpoint.description: Query user profiles to verify credentials
